suite.name: App Launch Tests

test.name: SG-1 Verify Application Launch

kw.name: Open MoRent Application
Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Open the MoRent application in the browser and maximize the window.

kw.name: Verify No Browser Error
Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Verify that no browser-level error page (such as 404, 500, or blank page) is displayed after launching the application.

kw.name: Verify Home Page Loaded Successfully
Wait For Page To Load Completely
Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Page Should Be Ready
Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verify that the page has fully loaded by checking the document ready state.

kw.name: Page Should Be Ready
Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verify that the page has fully loaded by checking the document ready state.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
Wait until the page has fully loaded by checking the document ready state.

kw.name: Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Verify that the Home page of the MoRent application has loaded successfully by checking for key elements.

kw.name: Verify Page Readiness
Wait For Page To Load Completely
Get Config Value
kw.doc: Placeholder for config retrieval.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Page Should Be Ready
Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: return document.readyState Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Verify that the page has fully loaded by checking the document ready state.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
Wait until the page has fully loaded by checking the document ready state.
Verify that the Home page is stable and ready for further interactions after loading.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Verify that the MoRent application launches successfully and the Home page loads without errors. Launch the MoRent website Wait for the page to load completely. Verify Application Load: Check that the website loads successfully in the browser. Ensure no browser-level error page (404, 500, or blank page) is displayed. Verify that the Home page main container is present. Verify Page Readiness: Ensure the Home page is stable and ready for further interactions. Expected Results: The MoRent website opens successfully. The Home page loads without any errors. The main Home page container is visible. The application is ready for further automated test execution.

suite.doc: Automate the verification of the MoRent application launch to ensure that the website is accessible and the Home page loads successfully without any errors.
